en_title: True Scale of Bungie Layoffs Revealed, With Nearly 300 Cut From Its Bellevue, Washington Headquarters Alone
cn_title: Bungie再裁近300人 华盛顿总部受重创
subtitle: 三年三轮血洗
opus_summary: Bungie华盛顿总部裁员292人，为三年内第三轮。索尼CEO称此举为资源对齐。《命运2》停更，《失落星船：马拉松》表现不佳。

paragraphs.en: The layoffs Bungie announced yesterday hit nearly 300 staff who worked at the developer’s Bellevue, Washington office, official records have revealed.
paragraphs.cn: 官方记录显示，Bungie昨日宣布的裁员波及近300名员工，这些员工均在开发商位于华盛顿州贝尔维尤的办公室工作。

paragraphs.en: A Worker Adjustment and Retraining Notification (WARN) notice issued by Sony to the Washington State Employment Security Department, reported by Game File , reveals 292 staff have been let go with a formal separation date set for July 9. This number does not account for Bungie staff outside Washington state. It is unknown how many staff remain at Bungie following the cuts, although the studio was reported to have employed 850 staff as of 2024.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼向华盛顿州就业保障部提交的《工人调整和再培训通知》（WARN）显示，共有292名员工被解雇，正式离职日期定为7月9日。该通知由Game File报道。此数字不包含华盛顿州以外的Bungie员工。目前尚不清楚裁员后Bungie还剩下多少员工，但据报道该工作室截至2024年拥有850名员工。

paragraphs.en: It is Bungie's third round of layoffs in three years. According to The Seattle Times , Bungie once had 1,000 employees in Bellevue, according to a 2023 annual financial report from the city. Between October 2023 and July 2024, Bungie laid off around 320 staff. Local press have called the cuts a "bloodbath."
paragraphs.cn: 这是Bungie三年内的第三轮裁员。据《西雅图时报》引用该市2023年年度财务报告，Bungie在贝尔维尤曾拥有1000名员工。在2023年10月至2024年7月间，Bungie裁掉了约320人。当地媒体称此次裁员为「血洗」。

paragraphs.en: In its statement yesterday, Hermen Hulst, CEO, Studio Business Group, Sony Interactive Entertainment, spoke about the layoffs in general terms, only saying a “significant” number of employees had been affected, hitting "most of the Destiny team and some Marathon team members.”
paragraphs.cn: 在昨日的声明中，索尼互动娱乐工作室业务集团CEO Hermen Hulst笼统谈及裁员，仅表示有「相当数量」的员工受到影响，波及「《命运》团队的大部分成员及《失落星船：马拉松》团队的部分成员」。

paragraphs.en: Hulst described the decision as "difficult" and "painful," but "necessary to align the studio’s resources with its current priorities and long-term goals." The news follows the recent ending of new content for Destiny 2, and the release of hardcore extraction shooter Marathon, which has struggled for players. Sony has insisted it remains committed to Marathon, whose team is also said to be working on “incubation efforts for future projects.”
paragraphs.cn: Hulst称这一决定「艰难」且「痛苦」，但为了「使工作室资源与当前优先事项及长期目标保持一致」，「势在必行」。消息传出前，《命运2》刚停止更新内容，而《失落星船：马拉松》这款硬核撤离射击游戏也正为吸引玩家而苦苦挣扎。索尼坚称仍会全力支持《失落星船：马拉松》，该团队据称还在为「未来项目进行孵化探索」。

paragraphs.en: The WARN notice redacts individual names, but includes job titles. It reveals staff across all departments were hit, including artists and technical animators, audio leads and sound designers, engineers, producers, and systems designers, and integrated Sony support teams that manage day-to-day Bungie infrastructure.
paragraphs.cn: WARN通知隐去了个人姓名，但列出了职位名称。通知显示所有部门的员工均受波及，包括美术师和技术动画师、音频主管和音效设计师、工程师、制作人、系统设计师，以及负责Bungie日常基础设施的索尼整合支持团队。

paragraphs.en: A number of former Bungie staff have taken to social media to confirm they were hit by the layoffs. Some are Bungie veterans of over a decade. Bloomberg reporter Jason Schreier Bungie studio head Justin Truman, who succeeded Pete Parsons last year, had stepped down. According to Forbes reporter Paul Tassi , former Bungie VP of Operations, Poria Torkan, has reportedly taken charge of the studio.
paragraphs.cn: 不少前Bungie员工在社交媒体上确认，他们也在裁员中受到影响。其中一些是为Bungie效力超过十年的老员工。据彭博社记者Jason Schreier报道，去年接替Pete Parsons出任Bungie工作室负责人的Justin Truman已经离职。《福布斯》记者Paul Tassi的报道则显示，前Bungie运营副总裁Poria Torkan据称已接手工作室。

paragraphs.en: Social media users have also picked up on the mention of “Chief Vision Officer” in the WARN notice . Some are speculating that this is Bungie co-founder and Halo and Destiny creator Jason Jones, who maintains a low profile and rarely speaks to the press. Jones appeared in an official Destiny 2 video released in 2021 in which he was described as Chief Vision Officer. If Jones has left Bungie — and this remains unconfirmed for now — it would represent a true end of an era for the studio behind some of the most iconic first-person shooters ever released.
paragraphs.cn: 社交媒体用户还留意到，WARN通知里出现了「首席愿景官」一职。有人推测，这指的很可能是Bungie联合创始人、《光环》与《命运》的缔造者Jason Jones，他一向低调，极少接受媒体采访。Jones曾在2021年一部《命运2》官方视频中露面，当时的职衔正是首席愿景官。如果Jones真的已经离开Bungie——这一点目前尚未得到证实——那对这家推出过数款标志性第一人称射击游戏的工作室而言，将意味着一个时代的真正落幕。

paragraphs.en: Bungie has struggled financially for some time, and reportedly was on the brink of closure before Sony bought the studio back in 2022 for $3.6 billion. Sony recently reported a $765 million impairment loss due to underperformance of Bungie specifically.
paragraphs.cn: Bungie已经财务吃紧了好一阵子。据报道，在索尼2022年以36亿美元(约合人民币245亿元)将其收入囊中之前，工作室就曾濒临关闭。近期，索尼又专门针对Bungie业绩不佳，报告了一笔7.65亿美元(约合人民币52亿元)的减值损失。

paragraphs.en: Bungie's issues with Destiny 2 reportedly began around the time of last summer's Edge of Fate expansion, which was said to have underperformed. The decision to pull the plug was allegedly made "earlier this year" after it was decided not to relaunch the franchise as "Destiny Infinity."
paragraphs.cn: 据报道，《命运2》遇到的问题大约始于去年夏天推出的扩展包《Edge of Fate》，该资料片据称同样未能达到预期。而决定停掉整个系列的想法，据说是「今年早些时候」做出的，公司决定不再以「《Destiny Infinity》」的名义重启这个IP。

paragraphs.en: Forbes reported that Bungie began discussing different scenarios about "what the future of Destiny 2 would look like" after December's Renegades, its Star Wars-themed crossover expansion, "did even worse [than Edge of Fate] and didn't change sales or retention trajectory."
paragraphs.cn: 《福布斯》的报道提到，去年12月的《Renegades》——一部《星球大战》主题的联动扩展——「表现甚至比《Edge of Fate》更差，也未能改变销售和玩家留存的下滑趋势」。在那之后，Bungie「就开始讨论《命运2》未来的多种可能场景」。

paragraphs.en: Destiny Infinity would have been a relaunch alongside a return to the one big expansion model Destiny used to have, but the idea fell by the wayside after it was allegedly decided that the costs and risks were too high, especially in the context of support for Marathon.
paragraphs.cn: 按照原计划，《Destiny Infinity》本应是一次重启，届时《命运》系列将重新回归过去那种每年推出一个大型扩展包的模式。但据说由于成本和风险过高，尤其是在《失落星船：马拉松》仍在获得支持的背景下，这个方案最终被搁置。

paragraphs.en: Destiny 3 "was considered, as ever, but things didn't swing that way," and there has been no behind-the-scenes hints that a third Destiny game is coming, with the cost of the game's production cited as the key issue.
paragraphs.cn: 《命运3》「一如既往地被考虑过，但事情并未朝着那个方向发展」，并且幕后没有任何迹象表明第三款《命运》游戏即将到来，游戏的制作成本被认为是关键问题。

paragraphs.en: Destiny 2 launched on PlayStation 4 and Xbox One on September 6, 2017, with a PC version following a month later. Behind the scenes, however, tension between Bungie and Activision emerged, and the two companies officially parted ways in January 2019, ending their 10-year publishing deal five years early.
paragraphs.cn: 《命运2》于2017年9月6日登陆PS4和XBOX One，PC版本一个月后推出。然而幕后，Bungie与动视之间的紧张关系浮现，两家公司于2019年1月正式分道扬镳，提前五年结束了长达十年的发行协议。

paragraphs.en: With Destiny in its own hands, Bungie self-published the game, but it couldn't escape financial troubles and layoffs as Destiny 2 expansions failed to hit the mark and the player base dwindled. Extraction shooter Marathon launched early March, with a reported budget of more than $250 million. It too, according to analysts, has failed to meet sales expectations.
paragraphs.cn: 自己掌控《命运》IP后，Bungie自行发行了游戏，但由于《命运2》资料片未能达标且玩家群体萎缩，它未能逃脱财务困境和裁员。撤离射击游戏《失落星船：马拉松》于3月初发售，据报道预算超过2.5亿美元(约合人民币17亿元)。据分析师称，它同样未能达到销量预期。

paragraphs.en: Photographer: Troy Harvey/Bloomberg via Getty Images.
paragraphs.cn: 摄影：Troy Harvey / 彭博社via Getty Images
